hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'ibkr: jq missing on PATH; failing closed for ibkr Bash commands' >&2; exit 2; }; cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:]/])ibkr[[:space:]]+' || exit 0; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:]/])ibkr[[:space:]]+(order|trade|cancel|submit|place)([[:space:]]|$)'; then echo 'ibkr: refusing trading verb; ibkr is read-only' >&2; exit 2; fi; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '[;&|<>`]|[$][(]|[[:cntrl:]]'; then echo 'ibkr: refusing shell metacharacters in allowed ibkr command' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
